case_for: Kelce just posted a season-high 25.0 points in week 8 and the pregame consensus projection remains a strong 25.0, signaling renewed volume and red-zone role.
case_against: His volatile 2024 season includes three sub-12 point outings (1.6, 7.0, 5.7) showing inconsistent target share and touchdown dependency that could easily produce another dud.
